commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR rewrites `docs/plugins/building-plugins.md` into a shorter plugin-author guide with revised quickstart, headings, and related links.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows the changed page now exposes `#registering-tools`, while unchanged docs and redirects still target `#registering-agent-tools`.
commands.review_followup: A narrow docs repair can preserve or update the stale anchor links on the PR branch without changing runtime behavior or product policy.

target.title: docs: clean up plugin building guides
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: the visible `Building plugins` docs mixed first-time author guidance with exhaustive SDK and maintainer reference material.
- Why it matters: plugin authors needed a shorter path to the right guide, while detailed API contracts should stay in reference pages.
- What changed: refactored the six visible Building plugins pages into focused author/contributor guides, aligned shared headings on `Requirements` and `Related`, repaired stale deep links after heading changes, and added required zh-CN glossary entries for changed doc titles.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): no SDK exports, plugin runtime behavior, nav placement, generated plugin references, or CLI behavior changed.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [x] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #
- Related #
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

Behavior addressed: Documentation-only cleanup for the Building plugins guide set.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw docs checkout in a Codex worktree on macOS.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm docs:list`; `pnpm docs:check-mdx`; `pnpm docs:check-links`; `pnpm docs:check-i18n-glossary`; `pnpm lint:docs`; `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`; ClawSweeper anchor grep for removed plugin-guide anchors.
Evidence after fix: `docs:check-mdx` passed 643 files; `docs:check-links` reported `checked_internal_links=4360` and `broken_links=0`; `lint:docs` reported 0 errors across 627 files; `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD` reported no whitespace errors; the stale-anchor grep returned no matches after the link repair.
Observed result after fix: the edited docs parse, links resolve, glossary check passes, markdown lint passes, stale removed anchors are no longer referenced, and the diff is whitespace-clean after rebasing on current `origin/main`.
What was not tested: `pnpm plugins:inventory:check` was not run because this PR does not change nav placement or generated plugin docs.
Before evidence (optional but encouraged): N/A.

## Root Cause (if applicable)

N/A.

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

N/A.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

The Building plugins docs are shorter, more guide-oriented, and use the shared `Requirements` and `Related` headings.

## Diagram (if applicable)

N/A.

## Security Impact (required)

- New permissions/capabilities? (`Yes/No`): No
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- New/changed network calls? (`Yes/No`): No
- Command/tool execution surface changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- Data access scope changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- If any `Yes`, explain risk + mitigation: N/A

## Repro + Verification

### Environment

- OS: macOS
- Runtime/container: local docs checkout
- Model/provider: N/A
- Integration/channel (if any): N/A
- Relevant config (redacted): N/A

### Steps

1. Run `pnpm docs:list`.
2. Run `pnpm docs:check-mdx`.
3. Run `pnpm docs:check-links`.
4. Run `pnpm docs:check-i18n-glossary`.
5. Run `pnpm lint:docs`.
6. Run `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`.

### Expected

- Docs index, MDX, links, i18n glossary, markdown lint, and whitespace checks pass.

### Actual

- All listed checks passed.

## Evidence

- [x] Trace/log snippets

## Human Verification (required)

What you personally verified (not just CI), and how:

- Verified scenarios: reviewed the changed docs headings, fixed PR review feedback, repaired stale deep links, resolved the rebase conflicts against current `origin/main`, and ran docs validation locally.
- Edge cases checked: confirmed stale `Before you begin` and `See also` headings no longer appear in the six Building plugins pages; checked for conflict markers and overindented prose outside code fences.
- What you did **not** verify: generated plugin inventory, because this PR does not edit generated plugin docs or nav placement.

## Review Conversations

- [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR.
- [x] I left unresolved only the conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? (`Yes/No`): Yes
- Config/env changes? (`Yes/No`): No
- Migration needed? (`Yes/No`): No
- If yes, exact upgrade steps: N/A

## Risks and Mitigations

None.
target.author: kevinslin

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
